name: EPHY AWUOR
description: Bold patterns meet urban elegance. Zuri's look combines traditional African textiles with contemporary streetwear.

name: RYAN OMONDI
description: Clean lines, earth tones, and effortless grace. Makena proves that less is always more.

name: ELIJAH KWAME
description: Thrifted classics reimagined. Elijah breathes new life into forgotten fashion eras.

name: AMARA OKECHUKWU
description: Metallic accents meet ancestral prints. Amara designs for the world of tomorrow.

name: KAIDEN NAKAMURA
description: High fashion meets sidewalk swagger. Kaiden redefines casual sophistication.

name: SADE ADEWALE
description: Flowing silhouettes and crown-worthy confidence. Sade dresses like everyday is a celebration.
